title: spinulum subarcticum
intro: Spinulum subarcticum, also known as the Arctic willow, is a shrub species native to the Arctic tundra in North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and prevent scurvy due to its high concentration of flavonoids and ascorbic acid. The health benefits of Spinulum subarcticum include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can aid in wound healing and prevent infections. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
